attributes.title: Asset Discovery & Reconciliation
attributes.description: IoT/OT enumeration posture: inventory vs discovered entities, reconciliation queue, and ledger activity. Skeleton for operator triage — fine-tune layout in Kibana.

Store feed carries **log-stream attestation** (`data_stream.dataset`, `event.module`) on discovered hosts \u2014 attestation, not hardware proof.
